# Presentation Content Template

> **Instructions:** Fill in the sections below. Copilot will use this to generate your Payoneer-branded HTML slides.
>
> - Replace `[placeholder]` text with your content
> - Delete any slides you don't need
> - Add more slides by copying a slide block

---

## METADATA
```yaml
title: [Presentation Title]
subtitle: [Brief tagline or description]
presenter: [Your Name]
role: [Your Role/Title]
date: [Presentation Date]
audience: [executives | engineers | stakeholders | mixed]
tone: [formal | business-casual | technical | conversational]
```

---

## SLIDE 1: Title
**Type:** title-slide

**Content:**
- Title: [Main Presentation Title]
- Subtitle: [Secondary description]
- Presenter: [Name, Role]
- Date: [Date]

---

## SLIDE 2: Agenda
**Type:** agenda-slide

**Content:**
| # | Topic | Duration |
|---|-------|----------|
| 1 | [Topic] | [X min] |
| 2 | [Topic] | [X min] |
| 3 | [Topic] | [X min] |
| 4 | [Topic] | [X min] |

---

## SLIDE 3: Content
**Type:** content-slide

**Content:**
- Title: [Slide Title]
- Points:
  - [Key point 1]
  - [Key point 2]
  - [Key point 3]

---

## SLIDE 4: Problem
**Type:** problem-slide

**Content:**
- Title: [Problem Statement]
- Pain Points:
  - [Pain point 1] -> Impact: [X%]
  - [Pain point 2] -> Impact: [X%]
  - [Pain point 3] -> Impact: [X%]
  - [Pain point 4] -> Impact: [X%]

---

## SLIDE 5: Comparison
**Type:** table-slide

**Content:**
- Title: [Comparison Title]
- Options: [Option A], [Option B], [Option C]
- Criteria:
  | Criteria | Option A | Option B | Option C |
  |----------|----------|----------|----------|
  | [Criteria 1] | [good/medium/poor] | [good/medium/poor] | [good/medium/poor] |
  | [Criteria 2] | [good/medium/poor] | [good/medium/poor] | [good/medium/poor] |
  | [Criteria 3] | [good/medium/poor] | [good/medium/poor] | [good/medium/poor] |
- Recommendation: [Which option and brief reason]

---

## SLIDE 6: Process
**Type:** process-slide

**Content:**
- Title: [Process Title]
- Steps:
  1. [Step 1 Title] - [Brief description]
  2. [Step 2 Title] - [Brief description]
  3. [Step 3 Title] - [Brief description]
  4. [Step 4 Title] - [Brief description]
  5. [Step 5 Title] - [Brief description]

---

## SLIDE 7: Architecture
**Type:** architecture-slide

**Content:**
- Title: [System/Architecture Title]
- Diagram: [Describe the diagram or provide mermaid code]
- Callouts:
  1. [Component 1] - [Description]
  2. [Component 2] - [Description]
  3. [Component 3] - [Description]
  4. [Component 4] - [Description]

---

## SLIDE 8: Stats
**Type:** stats-slide

**Content:**
- Title: [Metrics Title]
- Stats:
  - [Number/Value] | [Label] | [up/down/neutral]
  - [Number/Value] | [Label] | [up/down/neutral]
  - [Number/Value] | [Label] | [up/down/neutral]
  - [Number/Value] | [Label] | [up/down/neutral]

---

## SLIDE 9: Quote
**Type:** quote-slide

**Content:**
- Quote: "[The quote text]"
- Author: [Name]
- Role: [Title/Role]
- Company: [Company/Organization]

---

## SLIDE 10: Next Steps
**Type:** next-steps-slide

**Content:**
- Title: Next Steps
- Actions:
  | Action | Owner | Due Date | Status |
  |--------|-------|----------|--------|
  | [Action 1] | [Name] | [Date] | [pending/in-progress/done] |
  | [Action 2] | [Name] | [Date] | [pending/in-progress/done] |
  | [Action 3] | [Name] | [Date] | [pending/in-progress/done] |

---

## SLIDE 11: Closing
**Type:** closing-slide

**Content:**
- Title: Questions?
- Contact: [your.email@payoneer.com]
- Topics:
  - [Discussion topic 1]
  - [Discussion topic 2]
  - [Discussion topic 3]

---

# Available Slide Types

Use these in the **Type:** field:

| Type | Use For |
|------|---------|
| `title-slide` | Opening slide |
| `content-slide` | General bullet points |
| `agenda-slide` | Meeting agenda with times |
| `problem-slide` | Problem statement with pain points |
| `table-slide` | Comparisons, decision matrices |
| `process-slide` | Workflows, step-by-step |
| `architecture-slide` | System diagrams (supports Mermaid) |
| `stats-slide` | KPIs, metrics, numbers |
| `quote-slide` | Testimonials, quotes |
| `pros-cons-slide` | Trade-off analysis |
| `team-slide` | Team introductions |
| `icon-grid-slide` | Features, capabilities |
| `image-slide` | Full-bleed visuals |
| `milestone-slide` | Achievements, celebrations |
| `section-divider-slide` | Section breaks |
| `graph-slide` | Charts and data viz |
| `resources-slide` | Links, QR codes |
| `next-steps-slide` | Action items |
| `closing-slide` | Q&A, contact info |
